◎简　　介  

　　克里斯蒂安·魏森伯恩在1976-78年间曾经拍过一回赫尔佐格的传记，他再度拜访住在洛杉矶的维尔纳·赫尔佐格，详细地询问了他的纪录片拍摄工作。这是一个包含众多电影拍摄范例的采访。Christian Weisenborn and Werner Herzog know each other for more than 40 years. His first film on Werner Herzog "I am my films" (1976-78) covered Herzog's beginning as a filmmaker, the new film is a sequel titled "I am my films, part 2, -30 years later-" in which Weisenborn talks about Werne...
